message:
fix(sync): Refactor Mutex/Semaphore to use WaitQueue for cancel-safety [asupersync-bser]

- Replaced ticket lock with VecDeque-based wait queue in Mutex and Semaphore.
- Fixed cancellation deadlock where cancelled waiters left gaps in ticket sequence.
- Fixed borrow checker errors in decoding.rs.
- Added missing field to PoolConfig initialization.
